mapper.select: SELECT p.status AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM project p WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.status ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT COALESCE(p.current_phase, 'UNKNOWN') AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM project p WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.current_phase ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT t.month AS month, COALESCE(new_cnt.cnt, 0) AS newCount, COALESCE(done_cnt.cnt, 0) AS completedCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{year}, '-', LPAD(m.idx, 2, '0'), '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '%Y-%m') AS month FROM ( SELECT 1 AS idx UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 UNION SELECT 11 UNION SELECT 12 ) m ) t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS ym, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND YEAR(create_time) = #{year} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') ) new_cnt ON new_cnt.ym = t.month LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(actual_end, '%Y-%m') AS ym, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND actual_end IS NOT NULL AND YEAR(actual_end) = #{year} AND status IN ('CLOSE', 'ARCHIVED') GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(actual_end, '%Y-%m') ) done_cnt ON done_cnt.ym = t.month ORDER BY t.month
SELECT d.status AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM device_instance d WHERE d.deleted = 0 GROUP BY d.status ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT 'TOTAL' AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM engineer WHERE deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'ACTIVE' AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM engineer WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT 'TOTAL' AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM agent_company WHERE deleted = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'ACTIVE' AS name, COUNT(*) AS value FROM agent_company WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'

(SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, 'PROJECT_OVERDUE' AS risk_type, '项目超期' AS risk_type_name, CONCAT('计划结束日期 ', DATE_FORMAT(p.planned_end, '%Y-%m-%d'), ' 已超期，当前状态：', p.status) AS description, p.progress_pct, e.name AS pm_name, p.planned_end, p.status FROM project p LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.user_id = p.pm_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.planned_end IS NOT NULL AND p.planned_end < CURDATE() AND p.status NOT IN ('CLOSE', 'ARCHIVED', 'CANCELLED'))
UNION ALL
(SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, 'OVERDUE_TASK' AS risk_type, '超期任务' AS risk_type_name, CONCAT('存在 ', cnt.overdue_cnt, ' 个超期未完成任务') AS description, p.progress_pct, e.name AS pm_name, p.planned_end, p.status FROM project p INNER JOIN ( SELECT t.project_id, COUNT(*) AS overdue_cnt FROM project_task t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.planned_end IS NOT NULL AND t.planned_end < CURDATE() AND t.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CONFIRMED') GROUP BY t.project_id ) cnt ON cnt.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.user_id = p.pm_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status NOT IN ('CLOSE', 'ARCHIVED', 'CANCELLED'))
UNION ALL
(SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, 'UNRESOLVED_ISSUE' AS risk_type, '未解决问题' AS risk_type_name, CONCAT('存在 ', cnt.issue_cnt, ' 个未关闭问题') AS description, p.progress_pct, e.name AS pm_name, p.planned_end, p.status FROM project p INNER JOIN ( SELECT i.project_id, COUNT(*) AS issue_cnt FROM project_issue i WHERE i.deleted = 0 AND i.status IN ('OPEN', 'PROCESSING') GROUP BY i.project_id ) cnt ON cnt.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.user_id = p.pm_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status NOT IN ('CLOSE', 'ARCHIVED', 'CANCELLED'))
UNION ALL
(SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, 'PROGRESS_DELAY' AS risk_type, '进度滞后' AS risk_type_name, CONCAT('项目处于 ', p.status, ' 阶段，进度仅 ', p.progress_pct, '%') AS description, p.progress_pct, e.name AS pm_name, p.planned_end, p.status FROM project p LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.user_id = p.pm_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status IN ('EXECUTE', 'ACCEPT') AND p.progress_pct < 30)
ORDER BY risk_type LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id AS project_id, p.project_code, p.project_name, p.status, p.current_phase, p.project_type, p.priority, p.progress_pct, p.region, p.planned_start, p.planned_end, e.name AS pm_name, c.customer_name FROM project p LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.user_id = p.pm_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN customer c ON c.id = p.customer_id AND c.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.pm_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.status, p.update_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.task_name, t.task_type, t.status, t.project_id, p.project_name, p.project_code, t.execute_mode, t.priority, t.planned_start, t.planned_end, 1 AS overdue FROM project_task t INNER JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 INNER JOIN engineer e ON e.id = t.assignee_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND e.user_id = #{userId} AND t.planned_end IS NOT NULL AND t.planned_end < #{today} AND t.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CONFIRMED') ORDER BY t.planned_end ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND pm_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_task t INNER JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND p.pm_id = #{userId} AND t.status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outsource_task ot INNER JOIN project p ON p.id = ot.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE ot.deleted = 0 AND p.pm_id = #{userId} AND ot.status = 'SUBMITTED'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_task t INNER JOIN engineer e ON e.id = t.assignee_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND e.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CONFIRMED') AND ( (t.planned_start IS NULL AND t.planned_end IS NULL) OR (t.planned_start IS NULL AND t.planned_end >= #{today}) OR (t.planned_start <= #{today} AND t.planned_end IS NULL) OR (t.planned_start <= #{today} AND t.planned_end >= #{today}) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_task t INNER JOIN engineer e ON e.id = t.assignee_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND e.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status IN ('PENDING', 'ASSIGNED', 'IN_PROGRESS')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_change_log WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM outsource_workload WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'SUBMITTED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time < #{beforeDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device_instance WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time < #{beforeDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM engineer WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time < #{beforeDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_company WHERE deleted = 0 AND create_time < #{beforeDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN ('CLOSE', 'ARCHIVED', 'CANCELLED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device_instance WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ONLINE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM engineer WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_company WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM device_instance WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM engineer WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_company WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT status, CASE status WHEN 'INIT' THEN '立项' WHEN 'PLAN' THEN '规划' WHEN 'EXECUTE' THEN '执行' WHEN 'ACCEPT' THEN '验收' WHEN 'CLOSE' THEN '结项' WHEN 'ARCHIVED' THEN '归档' WHEN 'ON_HOLD' THEN '挂起' WHEN 'CANCELLED' THEN '取消' ELSE status END AS statusName, COUNT(*) AS count FROM project WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = #{status} AND pm_id = #{pmId} AND product_line = #{productLine} AND region = #{region} GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT p.pm_id AS pmId, e.name AS pmName, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN p.status IN ('CLOSE','ARCHIVED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN p.planned_end IS NOT NULL AND p.planned_end < CURDATE() AND p.status NOT IN ('CLOSE','ARCHIVED','CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue FROM project p LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.user_id = p.pm_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.pm_id IS NOT NULL AND p.status = #{status} AND p.pm_id = #{pmId} AND p.product_line = #{productLine} AND p.region = #{region} GROUP BY p.pm_id, e.name ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT p.id, p.project_code AS projectCode, p.project_name AS projectName, p.status, p.progress_pct AS progressPct, e.name AS pmName, p.planned_start AS plannedStart, p.planned_end AS plannedEnd, p.actual_end AS actualEnd, CASE WHEN p.planned_end IS NOT NULL AND p.planned_end < CURDATE() AND p.status NOT IN ('CLOSE','ARCHIVED','CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS overdue FROM project p LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.user_id = p.pm_id AND e.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = #{status} AND p.pm_id = #{pmId} AND p.product_line = #{productLine} AND p.region = #{region} ORDER BY overdue DESC, p.planned_end ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ONLINE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS online, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('IN_FACTORY','SHIPPED','DELIVERED','WAIT_INSTALL') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS offline, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('FAULT','ABNORMAL','REPAIRING') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormal FROM device_instance WHERE deleted = 0
AND model_id IN (SELECT id FROM device_model WHERE deleted = 0 AND product_line = #{productLine})

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM device_instance WHERE deleted = 0
AND model_id IN (SELECT id FROM device_model WHERE deleted = 0 AND product_line = #{productLine})
GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT COALESCE(m.product_line, '未分类') AS productLine, COUNT(*) AS count FROM device_instance d LEFT JOIN device_model m ON m.id = d.model_id AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND m.product_line = #{productLine} GROUP BY m.product_line ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT p.id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, SUM(b.planned_qty) AS totalQty, SUM(b.received_qty) AS completedQty, CASE WHEN SUM(b.planned_qty) > 0 THEN ROUND(SUM(b.received_qty) / SUM(b.planned_qty) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS rate FROM device_bom b INNER JOIN project p ON p.id = b.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.id, p.project_name ORDER BY rate ASC

SELECT COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, '未分配仓库') AS warehouseName, COUNT(d.id) AS totalQty, 0 AS warningQty FROM device_instance d LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON w.id = d.warehouse_id AND w.deleted = 0 WHERE d.deleted = 0 AND d.warehouse_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY w.id, w.warehouse_name ORDER BY totalQty DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS totalEngineers, COALESCE(SUM(ts.hours), 0) AS totalHours, COALESCE(SUM(ts.overtime_hours), 0) AS overtimeHours, CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(ts.hours), 0) / COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) / 176 * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS avgUtilization FROM engineer e LEFT JOIN timesheet ts ON ts.engineer_id = e.id AND ts.deleted = 0 WHERE e.deleted = 0 AND e.id = #{engineerId}

SELECT e.id AS engineerId, e.name AS engineerName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_task t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.assignee_id = e.id) AS taskCount, COALESCE(ts.hours, 0) AS hours, COALESCE(ts.overtime_hours, 0) AS overtimeHours, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ts.hours, 0) > 0 THEN LEAST(100, ROUND(COALESCE(ts.hours, 0) / 176 * 100, 2)) ELSE 0 END AS utilization, CASE WHEN COALESCE(done.completed, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(done.ontime, 0) / done.completed * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS onTimeRate FROM engineer e LEFT JOIN ( SELECT engineer_id, SUM(hours) AS hours, SUM(overtime_hours) AS overtime_hours FROM timesheet WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY engineer_id ) ts ON ts.engineer_id = e.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t.assignee_id, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('COMPLETED','CONFIRMED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN t.status IN ('COMPLETED','CONFIRMED') AND t.planned_end IS NOT NULL AND t.actual_end IS NOT NULL AND t.actual_end <= t.planned_end THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ontime FROM project_task t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.assignee_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t.assignee_id ) done ON done.assignee_id = e.id WHERE e.deleted = 0 AND e.id = #{engineerId} ORDER BY hours DESC

SELECT p.id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, COALESCE(SUM(ts.hours), 0) AS hours, COUNT(DISTINCT ts.engineer_id) AS engineerCount FROM project p LEFT JOIN timesheet ts ON ts.project_id = p.id AND ts.deleted = 0 WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.id, p.project_name HAVING hours > 0 OR engineerCount > 0 ORDER BY hours DESC

SELECT COALESCE(rev.total, 0) AS totalRevenue, COALESCE(cost.total, 0) AS totalCost, COALESCE(rev.total, 0) - COALESCE(cost.total, 0) AS totalProfit, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rev.total, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND((COALESCE(rev.total, 0) - COALESCE(cost.total, 0)) / rev.total * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS profitMargin FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(b.total_amount), 0) AS total FROM finance_budget b INNER JOIN project p ON p.id = b.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND p.customer_id = #{customerId} ) rev, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(c.amount), 0) AS total FROM finance_cost c INNER JOIN project p ON p.id = c.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND p.customer_id = #{customerId} ) cost

SELECT c.id AS customerId, c.customer_name AS customerName, COALESCE(rev.amount, 0) AS revenue, COALESCE(cost.amount, 0) AS cost, COALESCE(rev.amount, 0) - COALESCE(cost.amount, 0) AS profit FROM customer c INNER JOIN project p ON p.customer_id = c.id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p2.customer_id, SUM(b.total_amount) AS amount FROM finance_budget b INNER JOIN project p2 ON p2.id = b.project_id AND p2.deleted = 0 WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.approval_status = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY p2.customer_id ) rev ON rev.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p3.customer_id, SUM(c2.amount) AS amount FROM finance_cost c2 INNER JOIN project p3 ON p3.id = c2.project_id AND p3.deleted = 0 WHERE c2.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p3.customer_id ) cost ON cost.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.deleted = 0 AND c.id = #{customerId} GROUP BY c.id, c.customer_name, rev.amount, cost.amount HAVING revenue > 0 OR cost > 0 ORDER BY profit DESC

SELECT COALESCE(p.region, '未分类') AS region, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_amount), 0) AS revenue, COALESCE(cost.cnt, 0) AS cost, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_amount), 0) - COALESCE(cost.cnt, 0) AS profit FROM project p LEFT JOIN finance_budget b ON b.project_id = p.id AND b.deleted = 0 AND b.approval_status = 'APPROVED' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, SUM(amount) AS cnt FROM finance_cost WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY project_id ) cost ON cost.project_id = p.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.region, cost.cnt ORDER BY profit DESC

SELECT COALESCE(p.product_line, '未分类') AS productLine, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_amount), 0) AS revenue, COALESCE(cost.cnt, 0) AS cost, COALESCE(SUM(b.total_amount), 0) - COALESCE(cost.cnt, 0) AS profit FROM project p LEFT JOIN finance_budget b ON b.project_id = p.id AND b.deleted = 0 AND b.approval_status = 'APPROVED' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, SUM(amount) AS cnt FROM finance_cost WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY project_id ) cost ON cost.project_id = p.id WHERE p.deleted = 0 GROUP BY p.product_line, cost.cnt ORDER BY profit DESC

SELECT w.agent_company_id AS agentCompanyId, ac.company_name AS agentCompanyName, COALESCE(SUM(w.total_amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN w.payment_status = 'PAID' THEN w.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS paidAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN w.payment_status IN ('UNPAID','PAYING') THEN w.total_amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingAmount FROM finance_workload_confirmation w LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = w.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 WHERE w.deleted = 0 GROUP BY w.agent_company_id, ac.company_name ORDER BY totalAmount DESC
